opinion.h4: BROOKSHIRE v. MISSOURI. APPEAL FROM THE SUPREME COURT OF MISSOURI. No. 351. Decided November 5, 1962.
opinion.p: The appeal is dismissed. Treating the papers whereon the appeal was taken as a petition for writ of certiorari, certiorari is denied.
opinion.h4: CITIZENS UTILITIES CO. OF CALIFORNIA v. SUPERIOR COURT, (1962)
opinion.p: CITIZENS UTILITIES CO. OF CALIFORNIA v. SUPERIOR COURT OF CALIFORNIA FOR SACRAMENTO COUNTY ET AL. APPEAL FROM THE DISTRICT COURT OF APPEAL OF CALIFORNIA, THIRD APPELLATE DISTRICT. No. 330. Decided November 5, 1962.
Appeal dismissed for want of a substantial federal question.
Martin McDonough for City of North Sacramento, appellee.
The motion to dismiss is granted and the appeal is dismissed for want of a substantial federal question.
